content:
Member-only story

Flask

Python

Webdevelopment

Flasktutorial

Coding

A working Flask application — Episode 1

5 min read
1 hour ago

--

In this episode you will build the foundation of a simple voting
application using Flask and SQLAlchemy.
By the end of this chapter you will have:
A working Flask application
- Environment-based configuration
- A SQLite database
- SQLAlchemy models
- A seeded database with sample data
- Your first dynamic HTML page
Press enter or click to view image in full size

GitHub Repo link
Project Structure
vote/
├── vote.py
├── config.py
├── models.py
├── requirements.txt
├── templates/
│ └── index.html
├── static/
│ └── css/
│ └── style.css
├── instance/
│ └── vote.db
└── .env
Step 1 — Create a Virtual Environment
My Python version:
python --versionPython 3.12.3Linux/macOS:
python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activateWindows (powershell):
python -m venv .venv
